name: Silky Bean Curd Soup with Greens
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces silky soft bean curd, cut into 1/2-inch dice
8 ounces spinach, stemmed and leaves washed
Garnish: crushed red pepper flakes; toasted sesame seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring chicken broth and water to a simmer with soy sauce.
2. Whisk a few tablespoons of the hot broth into the miso paste and set aside.
3. Add bean curd and spinach to the soup and cook over low heat for about 1 minute to wilt.
4. Return the miso paste to the soup and simmer for a few seconds to thicken, but do not boil.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Garnish with crushed red pepper flakes and toasted sesame seeds before serving.
Yield: 2 servings
